query: Create log and square root transformations for numerical columns
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | generate_numerical_features(
    columns=['age', 'income', 'purchase_amount'],
    operations=['log', 'sqrt'],
    prefix='transform_',
    handle_zeros=True
)

query: One-hot encode categorical variables for machine learning
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | generate_categorical_features(
    columns=['category', 'region', 'customer_type'],
    encoding_type='onehot',
    max_categories=15
)

query: Create interaction features between age and income columns
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | generate_interaction_features(
    column_pairs=[('age', 'income'), ('price', 'quantity')],
    operations=['multiply', 'divide'],
    prefix='interaction_'
)

query: Create binary classification labels for high-value customers
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | create_binary_labels(
    column='lifetime_value',
    condition='>1000',
    label_column='high_value',
    positive_label='1',
    negative_label='0'
)

query: Segment customers into multiple value tiers based on spending
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | create_multiclass_labels(
    column='annual_spend',
    bins=[0, 100, 500, 1000, 5000],
    labels=['Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Premium'],
    label_column='customer_tier'
)

query: Select the top 15 most important features for modeling
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | select_features(
    method='kbest',
    k=15,
    score_func=f_classif
)

query: Train a Random Forest with 200 trees and maximum depth of 10
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | train_random_forest(
    test_size=0.2,
    n_estimators=200,
    max_depth=10,
    min_samples_split=5,
    model_name='customer_model',
    random_state=42
)

query: Make predictions on the test set using trained model
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | predict(
    model_name='customer_model',
    data_split='test',
    prediction_name='test_predictions'
)

query: Calculate accuracy, precision, recall and F1-score for model evaluation
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | calculate_metrics(
    prediction_name='test_predictions',
    model_name='customer_model',
    average='weighted'
)

query: Save the trained model for production deployment
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | save_model(
    model_name='customer_model',
    filepath='production_model.joblib'
)

query: Print detailed classification metrics and feature importance
example:
pipeline = RFPipe.from_dataframe(data)
pipeline = pipeline | print_metrics(
    prediction_name='test_predictions',
    model_name='customer_model'
)

query: Complete customer churn prediction pipeline with feature engineering
example:
churn_pipeline = (
    RFPipe.from_dataframe(customer_data)
    | generate_numerical_features(['age', 'tenure', 'monthly_charges'], operations=['log', 'sqrt'])
    | generate_categorical_features(['contract_type', 'payment_method'], encoding_type='onehot')
    | generate_interaction_features([('age', 'tenure'), ('monthly_charges', 'tenure')])
    | create_binary_labels('total_charges', '<500', 'churn_risk')
    | select_features(method='kbest', k=20)
    | train_random_forest(n_estimators=300, max_depth=15, model_name='churn_model')
    | predict(model_name='churn_model')
    | calculate_metrics(model_name='churn_model')
    | print_metrics(model_name='churn_model')
    | save_model(model_name='churn_model')
)

query: Fraud detection model with advanced feature engineering
example:
fraud_pipeline = (
    RFPipe.from_dataframe(transaction_data)
    | generate_numerical_features(['amount', 'time_of_day'], operations=['log', 'sqrt', 'square'])
    | generate_categorical_features(['merchant_category', 'card_type'], encoding_type='onehot')
    | generate_interaction_features([('amount', 'time_of_day'), ('location_risk', 'merchant_category')])
    | select_features(method='mutual_info', k=25)
    | train_random_forest(n_estimators=500, max_depth=20, min_samples_leaf=5, model_name='fraud_model')
    | predict(model_name='fraud_model')
    | calculate_metrics(model_name='fraud_model')
    | print_metrics(model_name='fraud_model')
)

query: Customer segmentation with behavioral features and value prediction
example:
segmentation_pipeline = (
    RFPipe.from_dataframe(customer_behavior)
    | generate_numerical_features(['session_count', 'page_views', 'purchase_frequency'], operations=['log', 'sqrt'])
    | generate_categorical_features(['device_type', 'acquisition_channel'], encoding_type='onehot')
    | generate_interaction_features([('session_count', 'page_views'), ('purchase_frequency', 'avg_order_value')])
    | create_multiclass_labels('lifetime_value', bins=[0, 100, 500, 1000, float('inf')], labels=['Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Premium'])
    | select_features(method='kbest', k=18)
    | train_random_forest(n_estimators=200, max_depth=12, model_name='segment_model')
    | predict(model_name='segment_model')
    | calculate_metrics(model_name='segment_model', average='macro')
    | print_metrics(model_name='segment_model')
)
